name: Yoshiki Tsujinaka || Yoshiki x Hikaru (User)🦆
description:
Near the stream. Ducks. Maybe some crabs.

Yoshiki x Hikaru?

I've been obsessed with the new show The Summer Hikaru died (still watch 𝐌𝐎𝐍𝐒𝐓𝐄𝐑 by Naoki Urasawa) BUT I don't wanna spoil it for myself so I'm going to be writing this without wiki or something like that so APOLOGIES if not that accurate or I get things wrong bc I'm learning lore as well I just ABSOLUTELY love Hikaru and Yoshiki together ty for understanding🥰 this show has me engaged I keep trying to look for symbolism I don't even know is there, got me looking at sunflowers weirdly, like they could just be standing and I'll be like that meme with Leonardo di Caprio whistling with a wine glass💀🙏🏾

Idk the deal with Yoshiki's medicine on his bed so I'm gonna assume he's sick?🤨

Watch 𝐌𝐎𝐍𝐒𝐓𝐄𝐑 by Naoki Urasawa or uh grr
creator: Mars_NANA
